title: [PLACEHOLDER] AI-Augmented Due Diligence
summary: How large-language-model pipelines can shorten diligence cycles for small-to-mid-market acquisitions without sacrificing audit trail rigor. Looking at document extraction, red-flag surfacing, and human-in-the-loop review checkpoints.

title: [PLACEHOLDER] Regional Labor Market Shifts (Southwest US)
summary: Tracking migration of skilled labor across Nevada, Arizona, and Utah post-2024, with a focus on construction, hospitality, and logistics. Building a leading-indicator model for regional wage pressure.

title: [PLACEHOLDER] Fintech Regulatory Sandboxes
summary: A comparative study of state-level fintech sandbox programs and how consulting practices should advise clients navigating overlapping state and federal exemptions.

title: [PLACEHOLDER] Small Business Succession Planning
summary: Researching the succession gap facing owner-operated businesses as baby-boomer founders retire, and what consulting interventions actually move outcomes for buyers and sellers.

summary: Assessing grid resilience investments against extreme heat load forecasts, and where private consulting can help utilities and large commercial users plan capacity.

summary: Practical AI governance frameworks scaled down for companies without a dedicated compliance function — model inventories, vendor risk review, and lightweight audit cadences.
